Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ruler technique]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The First Elder of the Wei clan is rumored to know the Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — A Ruler technique can allow a user to call up aura from every sword in a room.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 1''' — A Ruler technique is the ability to manipulate compatible aura in the surrounding world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — The Endless Sword is a Ruler technique that gives her Path its name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin's Ruler technique produced an eruption of sword aura.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Techniques on Yerin's Path are half a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin can launch a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — There is a stone tablet explaining the Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Ruler technique is a power used by Orthos.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Ruler techniques can be used to add force aura to a push.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — The Skysworn Underlord used a Ruler technique to command the air and lock people in place.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — The Ruler technique can fall apart if concentration is split too many ways.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Longhook can use a Ruler technique.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — A Ruler technique can form a long wall of wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — A Ruler technique was used to manipulate black roots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Ruler technique could not catch Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — A Ruler technique appears as white mist within the boundary field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — A Ruler technique can turn loose stones and dust into deadly projectiles.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The gold dragon can break a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — A Ruler technique was dispersed by Eithan's pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — The Naru used a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — A blood aura spike can be a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Ruler technique is used by Naian Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Layering techniques may require using a Ruler technique, Striker technique, and Forger technique simultaneously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses a Ruler technique while building a Void Dragon's Dance.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The attackers use Ruler techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon struggled for control of a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — A Ruler technique was used to seal the stone of the fortress wall together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Ruler technique allows a user to call nearby aura to obey them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Ruler techniques can be used to strip logs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The unnatural terror was a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer cycles the Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan's Ruler technique spread a storm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — An Archlord's Ruler technique can be pushed away using soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Silent Servant completed her Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Ruler techniques were used by enemies during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Yan Shoumei's Endless Sword technique was under the control of her Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara pushed the Ruler technique aside while soaring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — A Ruler technique can be used to accompany the working of will.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven’s Glory School was gathering Ruler techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Ruler techniques can be used to create poisonous gas.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Matriarch used a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Elder Rahm was in the middle of a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon blended the Ruler technique with madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long used an incomplete Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Tomb Hydra's binding's Ruler technique did not activate because there was no death aura nearby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen was preparing a Ruler technique.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — A Ruler technique can seize madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — A Ruler technique controlled the wind aura around Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The legion tried to break the Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — A Ruler technique was used to lift the castle.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Ruler technique can bring out specific memories.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — A Ruler technique allows for the control of aura in an arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei's Ruler technique can latch onto people and make their blood boil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Anagi uses a Ruler technique that batters with waves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — A machine used in the cafeteria activated something like a Ruler technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
